description: Skill-level: /wicked-testing:acceptance orchestrates the 3-agent pipeline (writer → executor → reviewer) per skills/acceptance-testing/SKILL.md.

cases.prompt: Run /wicked-testing:acceptance scenarios/examples/api-health-check.md --phase all. The skill must dispatch all three pipeline agents in order: acceptance-test-writer (test plan), acceptance-test-executor (evidence collection), acceptance-test-reviewer (isolated verdict).
cases.notes: Confirms the full 3-agent pipeline fires in sequence — writer, executor, reviewer.

cases.prompt: Run /wicked-testing:acceptance with no scenario-file argument (or with a path that does not exist). The skill should refuse cleanly — no writer, executor, or reviewer dispatch — and emit ERR_SCENARIO_NOT_FOUND.
cases.notes: Refusal case — missing scenario path must NOT dispatch any pipeline agent.
